name: 5 ML Brimonidine Tartrate Eye Drops IP
about: 5 ML Brimonidine Tartrate Eye Drops IP is a liquid medication recommended for the eyes. It is used to treat conditions such as glaucoma, ocular hypertension, and other eye disorders that result in high pressure within the eye. Brimonidine Tartrate is an alpha agonist that works by reducing the amount of fluid production in the eye and increasing its outflow. The dosage guidelines of this medication are to be followed as per the suggestions of a healthcare professional. It is important to store the eye drops in a dry place to maintain its effectiveness. As an exporter, supplier, and trader, we provide high-quality 5 ML Brimonidine Tartrate Eye Drops IP that meets all the necessary standards.
